description: A plain scan of an official ICE letterhead document, not a designed meme/graphic. The letter is on white paper with the DHS seal and 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement / Acting Director' letterhead, dated September 26, 2025, addressed to 'Mayor Katrina R. Thompson, Municipal Building, 2350 South 25th Avenue, Broadview, Illinois 60155.' The body responds to the mayor's letter about the Broadview Processing Center, asserting the facility 'continues to face violence and unlawful activity by rioters,' referencing 'the armed attack on an ICE facility in Dallas' and chants of 'shoot ICE,' arguing these 'cannot be dismissed as peaceful protest,' demanding local police assistance, and concluding 'You can either continue to be part of the problem or choose to be part of the solution by directing your police to enforce local ordinances and working with us to remove violent offenders.' It is signed by Todd Lyons, Acting Director, with contact 'Chicago.Outreach@ice.dhs.gov' and footer 'www.ice.gov.' Although it is official messaging, visually it is a routine document scan with minimal design, so is_designed=false. Target audience: the public/press, posted to pressure a local official and frame protesters as rioters.
notable_text: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement Acting Director; Dear Mayor Thompson; You can either continue to be part of the problem or choose to be part of the solution...; Todd Lyons, Acting Director
